mapper.insert: INSERT INTO performance_adjustment_ledger ( id, event_key, order_id, refund_id, adjustment_type, refund_amount, delta_pay_amount, delta_settle_amount, delta_estimate_service_fee, delta_effective_service_fee, delta_estimate_tech_service_fee, delta_effective_tech_service_fee, delta_estimate_service_fee_expense, delta_effective_service_fee_expense, delta_talent_commission, delta_estimate_service_profit, delta_effective_service_profit, delta_estimate_recruiter_commission, delta_effective_recruiter_commission, delta_estimate_channel_commission, delta_effective_channel_commission, delta_estimate_gross_profit, delta_effective_gross_profit, occurred_at, input_snapshot, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventKey}, #{orderId}, #{refundId}, #{adjustmentType}, #{refundAmount}, #{deltaPayAmount}, #{deltaSettleAmount}, #{deltaEstimateServiceFee}, #{deltaEffectiveServiceFee}, #{deltaEstimateTechServiceFee}, #{deltaEffectiveTechServiceFee}, #{deltaEstimateServiceFeeExpense}, #{deltaEffectiveServiceFeeExpense}, #{deltaTalentCommission}, #{deltaEstimateServiceProfit}, #{deltaEffectiveServiceProfit}, #{deltaEstimateRecruiterCommission}, #{deltaEffectiveRecruiterCommission}, #{deltaEstimateChannelCommission}, #{deltaEffectiveChannelCommission}, #{deltaEstimateGrossProfit}, #{deltaEffectiveGrossProfit}, #{occurredAt}, CAST(#{inputSnapshot, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS JSONB), COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
